    U

    updateStatus(Long, DeviationStatus, User) - Method in class ntnu.no.fs_v26.controller.DeviationController
    Updates the status of an existing deviation.

    Updates the status of an existing deviation.
    updateUserRole(Long, AdminUpdateRoleRequest) - Method in class ntnu.no.fs_v26.controller.AdminController
    Updates the role of an existing user.

    Updates the role of an existing user.
    uploadDocument(MultipartFile, String, String, String, TrainingDocumentType, TrainingCompletionType) - Method in class ntnu.no.fs_v26.controller.TrainingController
    Uploads a training document as a file (multipart/form-data).
    uploadDocument(MultipartFile, String, String, String, TrainingDocumentType, TrainingCompletionType) - Method in class ntnu.no.fs_v26.service.TrainingService
    Uploads a training document as a file and saves it to the uploads/ directory.
    User - Class in ntnu.no.fs_v26.model
    Entity representing a user in the system.

    Creates a UserDetailsService bean that loads a user by e-mail.
